name: jumpshell
description: Install and manage JumpShell Copilot skills from VS Code or Cursor.

jumpshell.skillsPath.description: Directory where JumpShell installs Copilot skills. Use an absolute path or a path starting with ~/.

jumpshell.installMcpOnSkillsInstall.description: Also install/update JumpShell MCP configuration after running Update Skills.

jumpshell.installAiBackendsOnSkillsInsta.description: Also install/update ai_backends after running Update Skills.

jumpshell.mcpConfigScope.description: Where JumpShell writes MCP configuration. 'user' writes the active profile user mcp.json. 'workspace' writes workspace mcp.json under .vscode or .cursor.

jumpshell.workspaceMcpDirectory.description: Workspace MCP directory when jumpshell.mcpConfigScope=workspace. 'auto' chooses by active editor and existing mcp.json files.

jumpshell.moduleRootPath.description: Optional path to your JumpShell module root (or repo root). Leave blank to auto-detect.
